channel.title: Processes on My Wood Gallery
channel.description: Recent content in Processes on My Wood Gallery

item.title: Processes
item.description: Typically, a thin strip of hardwood is laminated into the saw kerf in order to improve the strength of the glue up. The thin strips also add artistic interest. To follow the board weaving process, click on the first picture and then "photo-swipe" through the album.
